capabilities.name: AI analysis intake and review artifact generation
capabilities.description: Parses a fenced AI analysis payload, classifies override candidates, and emits review artifacts without applying decisions.
limitations: AI response content is treated as candidate data and is not semantically validated.
Accepted override candidates are written to a proposed file only and are not applied to contest_overrides.yaml.

capabilities.name: AI problem-analysis prompt generation
capabilities.description: Builds a static prompt package from scan, spec, gap, and blueprint artifacts for external human-mediated AI analysis.
limitations: The factory only writes a prompt and does not call an external AI service.
Long source text is truncated for prompt size control.

capabilities.name: Base harness generation
capabilities.description: Copies the base harness template and writes a config derived from ContestSpec and optional blueprint data.
limitations: Generation is template copying plus config writing; it does not synthesize custom solver logic.
Existing output directory is replaced by the generator when invoked.

capabilities.name: Code Agent work-package generation
capabilities.description: Builds a bounded implementation prompt and context JSON from reviewed AI analysis candidates and factory artifacts.
limitations: The package is a prompt handoff artifact and does not execute Codex or shell commands.
Allowed file filtering is path-based and does not prove that future code changes are correct.

capabilities.name: ContestSpec generation
capabilities.description: Builds a deterministic ContestSpec from contest files, inferred CSV schema, output columns, and supported overrides.
limitations: Task type and output inference are heuristic and based on available files.
Unknown official rules remain unknown unless supported overrides are present.

capabilities.name: Contest requirement contract generation
capabilities.description: Builds deterministic Contest Requirement records from structured ContestSpec, Evidence Index, optional coverage, and fixed factory policy.
limitations: Requirements are generated only from structured artifacts and fixed deterministic rules.
Natural-language contest documents are not semantically interpreted.

capabilities.name: Requirement-Capability exact-token matching
capabilities.description: Compares Contest Requirement required tokens to audited Capability Registry provides tokens using exact matching, dependency checks, and risk gates.
limitations: Matching is exact-token based and does not prove semantic adequacy.
Constraint and prohibition compliance are reported but not proven by token matching.

capabilities.name: Evidence index generation
capabilities.description: Converts input scan facts into deterministic evidence records for inventory, structure, document chunks, and preview errors.
limitations: Evidence records capture observed static facts only.
AI inference and human decisions are not included in the evidence index.

capabilities.name: Gap analysis
capabilities.description: Summarizes confirmed facts, unknowns, risks, schema details, and human-required checks from ContestSpec.
limitations: Gap analysis reports unknowns from the current ContestSpec and does not resolve official rules.
Risk messages are conservative static guidance, not legal or contest-official validation.

capabilities.name: Harness blueprint generation
capabilities.description: Builds a harness blueprint with template recommendation, loader/solver/verifier/submitter requirements, risks, and pending decisions.
limitations: Blueprint requirements are derived from current static artifacts and do not prove final solver adequacy.
Template selection falls back to base_harness when specialized templates are absent.

capabilities.name: Human decision override application
capabilities.description: Applies supported contest_overrides.yaml fields into ContestSpec and marks corresponding human decision values.
limitations: Only explicitly supported dotted paths are applied.
Overrides are read from contest files and are not inferred or auto-written by this capability.

capabilities.name: Contest package input scanning
capabilities.description: Scans contest package files and emits deterministic metadata, CSV/JSON previews, document excerpts, and document chunks.
limitations: Image and binary document content is classified by file type but not semantically interpreted.
Document processing is deterministic text extraction and chunking only.

capabilities.name: Contest package coverage audit
capabilities.description: Audits manifest sources, scan artifacts, evidence records, core ContestSpec fields, high-risk unknowns, and not-modeled topics.
limitations: Coverage status links static artifacts and does not confirm official contest requirements.
Known not-modeled topics are reported instead of modeled into ContestSpec.

capabilities.name: Contest package manifest validation
capabilities.description: Loads and validates contest_package.json source declarations, source path safety, source kinds, visibility, and declared unknown paths.
limitations: Manifest schema is limited to the current v0.9B contest_package.json contract.
Validation checks source declaration structure and file presence, not source content truth.

capabilities.name: Decision Intake validation
capabilities.description: Validates Decision Intake structure, actor/status/action rules, supersession links, and subject drift digests without applying decisions.
limitations: Decision authorship is represented only by actor type and is not identity-authenticated.
Validation checks structure, references, supersession, and drift; it does not prove rationale correctness.

capabilities.name: Decision Ledger generation
capabilities.description: Builds append-only Decision Ledger JSON/Markdown artifacts and safe pending Decision Intake templates from requirements, matches, registry, and optional intake.
limitations: Confirmed decisions are recorded but are not automatically applied to ContestSpec or contest_overrides.
Ledger completeness does not constitute Human Approval or submission readiness.

capabilities.name: Generated harness constant baseline prediction
capabilities.description: Uses the base harness BaselineSolver to emit one constant target value per loaded task while preserving id values.
limitations: The baseline is constant and intentionally does not optimize score.
Prediction quality depends entirely on the configured default answer.

capabilities.name: Freeze Confirmation validation
capabilities.description: Validates human freeze confirmation intake entries, supersession history, digest drift, and candidate confirmation state for local submission handoff packages.
limitations: Human identity is declared but not cryptographically authenticated.
Confirmation proves agreement with a candidate digest only and does not perform online submission.

capabilities.name: Submission Handoff Package generation
capabilities.description: Builds deterministic local submission handoff manifests, strict allowlist packages, candidate digests, freeze templates, and stored ZIP archives.
limitations: The package is a local handoff artifact and is not uploaded automatically.
Frozen status does not guarantee contest acceptance, solver quality, or legal compliance.

capabilities.name: Generated harness CSV loading
capabilities.description: Loads generated harness JSON config and reads contest test.csv rows with CSV DictReader.
limitations: Only test.csv loading is implemented in the base harness.
CSV parsing relies on header names and does not perform feature validation.

capabilities.name: Human Approval Intake validation
capabilities.description: Validates local submission candidate approval entries, supersession history, current readiness digest drift, and gate check records.
limitations: Human actor identity is declared but not cryptographically authenticated.
Approval rationale and authority are not independently verified.

capabilities.name: Local Readiness Gate generation
capabilities.description: Builds deterministic local readiness, human approval, and overall gate summaries for a local submission candidate.
limitations: The gate evaluates configured local artifacts only and does not verify official contest acceptance.
An approved gate does not prove solver quality, legal compliance, or successful online submission.

capabilities.name: Generated harness submission CSV writing
capabilities.description: Writes submission rows to a CSV file using configured required column order.
limitations: Only configured required columns are written.
Missing row values are written as empty strings unless caught by later verification.

capabilities.name: Manual submission receipt validation
capabilities.description: Validates append-only manual submission receipt intake, supersession chains, platform metadata, stale digest binding, and receipt evidence declarations.
limitations: Receipt metadata and human identity are manually declared and are not independently authenticated.
Receipt evidence files are hashed but not text-extracted or semantically interpreted.

capabilities.name: Post-submission audit generation
capabilities.description: Audits a preserved manually submitted file and optional receipt metadata against a frozen local handoff manifest and package archive.
limitations: Audit completion proves local byte and receipt metadata binding only.
It does not query the competition platform or prove official acceptance, score validity, or compliance.

capabilities.name: Generated harness submission verification
capabilities.description: Checks submission existence, required columns, sample column order, row count, id uniqueness, id match, target emptiness, and allowed labels when configured.
limitations: Verification checks structural submission properties only.
It does not verify model accuracy or official leaderboard scoring.

capabilities.name: Generated harness validation report emission
capabilities.description: Writes validation report JSON and Markdown from generated harness verifier results.
limitations: Reports reflect the local verifier checks only.
The report does not represent human approval or official contest submission validation.
